title: Is there a way to link a form submission to these performance review sections?
excerpt: Hi there! I am trying to build out a performance review process in Monday and would like to have the employee and manager fill out a form that then links to this board by displaying their inputs on the master board. Is t…

posts.author: RyanSkytale (Ryan Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there! I am trying to build out a performance review process in Monday and would like to have the employee and manager fill out a form that then links to this board by displaying their inputs on the master board. Is there a way to do that? Also, is there a way to only allow the individuals to see each others inputs vs other people’s reviews on the board?

Screenshot 2024-01-31 at 1.31.51 PM1600×438 32 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Ryan,

At this time the form submissions will post to the specific board that it’s linked too! That said, you could set up automations or connect board/mirror columns to connect data to that high level master board.

  • What are High-Level and Low-Level boards?

Is this along the lines of what you’re looking to achieve?

As for permissions for reviewing inputs, our item viewing permissions might be what you’re looking for here - this is a feature that is currently available on our Enterprise plan.

Let me know your thoughts!
